landing.subtitleMain: Upload your PRD and User Flow documents. Our AI pipeline of 3 specialized agents reads, designs, and generates

pipeline.title: How It Works
pipeline.subtitle: Three specialized agents work in sequence — each with a single, clearly defined responsibility.
pipeline.flowInput: Input: PRD + User Flow + UI Description

agent1.title: Flow Normalization
agent1.desc: Reads PRD + User Flow documents. Extracts and normalizes all flows into clear, machine-readable structure.

agent2.title: Scenario Design
agent2.desc: Acts as your Senior QA. Designs Happy path, Negative, Edge, and Validation cases from each normalized flow.

agent3.title: YAML Generation
agent3.desc: Translates every test scenario into a complete, ready-to-run AutoMobile YAML file with real UI selectors.

documents.title: 3 Documents. That’s it.
documents.subtitle: No code. No config. Just upload your existing project documents and let the agents do the rest.

prd.title: PRD — Product Requirements
prd.desc: Describes features, business logic, input/output rules. The source of truth for what the app should do.

flow.title: User Flow Document
flow.desc: Step-by-step user behavior sequences. Describes how users interact with each screen and feature.

ui.title: UI Description
ui.desc: Details every UI component on each screen — element IDs, labels, states. Agent 3 uses this to map selectors.

demo.title: See the transformation
demo.subtitle: From human-readable spec ↔ executable YAML — automatically.

enterprise.title:
Enterprise-grade traceability,
without the overhead.
enterprise.feature1: End-to-end pipeline: PRD → Normalized Flow → Test Scenario → YAML
enterprise.feature2: Human-in-the-loop review gates at every agent handoff
enterprise.feature3: Cascade invalidation — re-run Agent 1 and downstream auto-updates
enterprise.feature4: Full traceability: any YAML step traces back to its source requirement
enterprise.feature5: Supports Happy path, Negative, Edge, Validation & Business rule cases

cta.title: Automate your QA pipeline today.
cta.subtitle: Stop spending weeks writing test scripts by hand. Let 3 AI agents do it in seconds — consistently, every time.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Mobile Auto Testcase Generator. Built for QA Engineers.

notFound.title: This route is off the map
notFound.description: The page you opened does not exist, may have moved, or is no longer available in this workspace.

upload.dragDrop: Click or drag and drop to upload multiple files
upload.viewerOnly: You only have view access to this project
upload.selectProject: Select a project from the left panel to enable upload
upload.title: Document Management
upload.subtitle: Project-based File/Folder CRUD for isolating flow agent data.
